user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign multiple resources to projects in a single bulk grid, so that I can plan allocations efficiently without editing each entry separately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Bulk Resource Assignments screen; When I enter project name and resource name across multiple rows; Then each assignment row is captured for saving

user_story: As a Manager, I want to set a start date and end date for each resource assignment using a calendar picker, so that allocations are bounded to the correct period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am entering a bulk assignment row; When I open the calendar and select start and end dates; Then the assignment date range is applied to that row

user_story: As a Manager, I want to specify allocated hours per day and allocated percentage per day for each resource, so that capacity is planned accurately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am entering a bulk assignment row; When I input allocated hours per day and allocated percentage per day; Then the values are recorded for that resource

user_story: As a Manager, I want to indicate allocation across weekdays (Su-Sa), so that assignments reflect the specific working days
acceptance_criteria: Given I am entering a bulk assignment row; When I select the applicable days from Su through Sa; Then the allocation is applied only to the chosen days

user_story: As a Manager, I want to save all bulk resource assignments at once, so that the planned allocations are committed together
acceptance_criteria: Given I have filled multiple assignment rows; When I click Save; Then all valid rows are persisted and confirmed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the bulk assignment grid, so that I can clear entered values and start over
acceptance_criteria: Given I have entered data in the grid; When I click Reset; Then the grid fields are cleared to their default state
